metadata.description: A woman in her 30s-40s has deep skin with a scattering of small freckles across her nose and cheeks. Her face is oval with a defined jawline. Her hair is a mix of dark brown and prominent gray, styled in medium-length, tight curls that frame her face and recede slightly at the temples. Her almond-shaped eyes are a warm hazel, set wide apart under medium-thick, arched eyebrows. Her nose has a broad bridge and a rounded tip, and her full lips are closed in a neutral expression. She has a scattering of small moles on her cheeks and forehead. Her head is angled slightly to the left, and her gaze is directed off-camera.
metadata.anchor: Prominent gray and dark brown curly hair
